findings.evidence: `SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientGroup.lean:114-118` defines `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivQuotientGroup` with only the action hypotheses, while `SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientGroup.lean:122-127` makes `regularSubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivQuotientGroup` just a wrapper; this file starts directly at the wrapper level at lines 49-54.
findings.fix: Add `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivNormalizerQuotientOfNormal` under `[MulAction.IsPretransitive (Deck p) (p ⁻¹' {b})] [IsCancelSMul (Deck p) (p ⁻¹' {b})]`, prove the simp lemmas at that level, and derive the regular versions by installing `hreg.fiber_isPretransitive b` and `fiber_isCancelSMul hp`.
findings.issue: `regularSubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivNormalizerQuotientOfNormal` and its simp lemmas require `[PreconnectedSpace E]`, `hp : IsCoveringMap p`, and `hreg : IsRegular p`, but the construction only composes the already-general fibre quotient equivalence with the algebraic normalizer comparison.

summary: The new normalizer quotient API is stated only for regular covering maps, but the existing fibre-quotient API already has the natural action-level version. Prove the general free-transitive action result first and make the regular-cover declarations wrappers.
